marshallese.answer_your_first_challenge_correctly: Uwaak challenge eo aṃ kein kajuon ilo jiṃwe
marshallese.what_number_does_the_arrow_point_to: Ta nōṃba eo arrow ej jitōñe?
marshallese.estimate_the_value_the_arrow_points_to: Aṇtọọn value eo arrow ej jitōñe (nōṃba eo epaaktata).
marshallese.one_third_repeats_forever: One third (ej bar jino ñan indeeo)
marshallese.two_thirds_repeats_forever: Two thirds (ej bar jino ñan indeeo)
marshallese.click_the_number_line_above_to_place_a: Kalliki number line eo ilōñ ñan likūt marker.
marshallese.number_line_marker_use_arrow_keys_to_m: Number line marker. Kōjerbal arrow keys ñan ṃakūtkūt, Home/End ñan endpoints, Shift ñan steps ko rellap.
marshallese.number_line_fractions_above_decimals_b: 📏 Number line — fractions ilōñ, decimals ilaḷ
marshallese.same_amount_three_more_visuals_quantit: 🔄 Joñan wōt juon, 3 visual ko jet. Joñan ej pād wōt ilo representation otemjej.
marshallese.this_decimal_repeats_forever: Decimal in ej bar jino ñan indeeo
marshallese.move_the_marker_by_a_fraction_fraction: ➕➖ Ṃakūtkūt marker kōn fraction — fraction arithmetic ioon line eo
marshallese.click_a_chip_below_the_marker_slides_a: Kalliki chip eo ilaḷ. Marker eo ej jir; 4 visual otemjej rej ukoot. Line eo ej make kilep eḷaññe kwōj ellā jān tōrerein.
marshallese.common_denominator_hunter_how_to_add_f: 🤝 Common-denominator hunter — ewi wāween kobaik fractions kōn denominators rej āinjuon
marshallese.you_cannot_add_1_2_1_3_directly_first_: Kwōjjab maroñ kobaik 1/2 + 1/3 tōre. Ṃokta pukot juon denominator ej jiṃor (LCM ej jerbal), āñin fraction otemjej, innem kobaik numerators.
marshallese.equivalent_fractions_same_point_many_n: ∞ Equivalent fractions — jikin wōt juon, elōñ āt ko. Kalliki ñan bar ajej line eo.
marshallese.multiply_or_divide_the_top_and_bottom_: Kōṃṃan ḷapḷọk (ak ajej) ilōñ IM ilaḷ kōn nōṃba wōt juon → value wōt juon, āt eo āinjuon. Marker eo ejjab ṃakūtkūt.
marshallese.a_quarter_is_0_25_1_4_of_a_dollar_a_di: Juon quarter ej $0.25 = 1/4 in dollar. Juon dime ej $0.10 = 1/10. Coins rej decimal-fraction practice.
marshallese.every_decimal_place_is_a_fraction_1st_: Decimal place otemjej ej fraction. 1st place: tenths, 2nd: hundredths, 3rd: thousandths.
marshallese.reset_frac_dec_tab_to_defaults: Reset Frac Dec tab ñan defaults
marshallese.why_fractions_and_decimals_are_the_sam: 💡 Etke fractions im decimals rej men wōt juon
marshallese.3_4_means_3_divided_by_4_type_3_4_into: 3/4 meḷeḷein "3 ajej kōn 4." Je 3 ÷ 4 ilo calculator jabdewōt: 0.75. Slash im ÷ rej meḷeḷe wōt juon.
marshallese.a_decimal_is_a_fraction_with_a_hidden_: Decimal ej fraction kōn juon denominator ettino.
marshallese.0_6_means_6_tenths_6_10_0_25_means_25_: 0.6 meḷeḷein "6 tenths," 6/10. 0.25 meḷeḷein "25 hundredths," 25/100, eo ej pidodo ñan 1/4.
marshallese.the_point_at_1_4_is_the_same_point_as_: Point eo ilo 1/4 ej point wōt juon āinwōt point eo ilo 0.25. Jikin wōt juon, ruo āt.
marshallese.some_terminate_some_repeat: Jet rej jeṃḷọk, jet rej bar jino.
marshallese.1_2_0_5_stops_1_4_0_25_stops_1_3_0_333: 1/2 = 0.5 (bōjrak). 1/4 = 0.25 (bōjrak). 1/3 = 0.333… (ej bar jino ñan indeeo). Denominator ej pepe: eḷaññe ej ajej ñan 2 im 5 wōt, ej jeṃḷọk. Eḷaññe jab, ej bar jino. Lale ↻ ioon decimal card.
marshallese.focus_explore_body: Likūt range eo, kobaik markers, im keidi distances.
marshallese.focus_challenges_body: Kaṃṃan aṇtọọn, rounding, im pukot values.
marshallese.focus_frac_body: Kobaik fractions, decimals, percents, im area models.
marshallese.focus_compare_body: Mālejjoñ fraction size relationships im ejjeḷọk score.
marshallese.focus_summary: Kōjerbal juon line ñan pukot values, kwaḷọk jumps, im kobaik equivalent forms.
marshallese.explore_the_visual_home_for_number_sen: Kappok — ṃweo in lale ñan number sense
marshallese.numbers_as_positions_on_a_line_not_jus: Nōṃba āinwōt jikin ioon line, jab symbols wōt. Negatives rej reflect iṃaan zero. Fractions rej pād IKŌTAAN integers; decimals rej ḷōmṇak wōt juon ak edik ḷọk. Common Core 2.MD.6, 3.NF.2, 6.NS.6.
marshallese.where_does_7_8_sit_what_about_2_4_esti: Ia 7/8 ej pād ie? Ta kōn −2.4? Aṇtọọn ej ejaak magnitude sense. Studies (Siegler 2009) rej kwaḷọk number-line precision ej kōttōpar math success ilju eṃṃanḷọk jān rote facts.
marshallese.skip_count_the_bridge_to_multiplicatio: Skip Count — the bridge to multiplication
marshallese.2_4_6_8_the_2_times_table_walking_skip: 2, 4, 6, 8… = 2 times table ej etetal. Skip counting kōn 5 im 10 ej ejaak money im time. Bwini likḷọk kōn 3 ej ejaak subtraction im division. Line eo ej kwaḷọk rhythm.
marshallese.fractions_decimals_same_point_two_name: Fractions ↔ Decimals, jikin wōt juon, ruo āt
marshallese.a_fraction_is_a_division_problem_a_dec: Fraction ej division problem. Decimal ej fraction kōn denominator ettino in 10, 100, 1000… 1/4 im 0.25 rej jikin WŌT JUON ioon line. Common Core 4.NF.6, 4.NF.7, 5.NBT.3.
marshallese.two_fractions_four_possible_relationsh: Ruo fractions, 4 relationships: joñan wōt juon, uñūri ½ landmark, A ediklok, ak B ediklok. Iper sliders, je men ko kwōj lo, im je comparison rule eo aṃ.
marshallese.adjust_the_numerators_and_denominators: Kōṃṃan numerators im denominators in ruo fractions. Widget eo ej ba ñan eok juon iaan 4 relationships. Ejjeḷọk score, ejjeḷọk reveal — iper wōt im lale.
marshallese.hypothesis_free_text_when_do_two_fract: Hypothesis (je anemkwōj): Ñāāt ruo fractions rej joñan wōt juon? Ñāāt juon epaak ñan ½?
marshallese.find_two_fractions_with_different_nume: Pukot ruo fractions kōn numerators im denominators āinjuon ak joñan wōt juon.
marshallese.what_makes_a_fraction_close_to_what_ab: Ta ej kōṃṃan fraction bwe en epaak ñan ½? Ta kōn epaak ñan 1?
marshallese.when_are_two_fractions_easy_to_compare: Ñāāt ruo fractions rej pidodo ñan keidi? Ñāāt rej pen?
marshallese.i_understand_explain_in_my_own_words: Ij meḷeḷe — kōmmeḷeḷeik kōn naan ko aō
marshallese.explain_how_to_compare_two_fractions_w: Kōmmeḷeḷeik ewi wāween keidi ruo fractions im jab ukot ñan decimals.
marshallese.design_note_discrete_4_state_outcome_n: Design note: discrete 4-state outcome; ejjeḷọk fraction-comparison score; ejjeḷọk reveal — kōn karōk.
marshallese.1_4_tabs_n_new_challenge_ai_tutor_on_m: ⌨️ 1-4: tabs | N: challenge ekāāl | ?: AI tutor | ← → ioon marker: ṃakūtkūt | Home/End: jeṃḷọk ko
marshallese.integers_absolute_value_distance_from_: Integers - Absolute value = tolọñ jān zero
marshallese.integer_lab_summary: Kappeḷọk mini lab eo ñe negative numbers rej focus.
marshallese.absolute_value_number_line_showing_dis: Absolute value number line ej kwaḷọk tolọñ jān zero
